panel.openDebug: Open debug logs in a new window
group.pausedNote: Group chat paused — click Resume to continue
group.empty.noMembers: Add agents to the group from "Members" in the top right
group.agent.empty: This agent hasn't done anything yet
debug.devtoolsFailed: Can't open DevTools. Right-click → Inspect Element instead.
debug.empty: No logs yet. Chatting and actions generate logs.
chat.context.title: Context usage
gallery.empty: No images or videos in the gallery folder
memory.subtitle: The pet's long-term memory, kept across conversations
memory.openDir: Open the memory folder in the file manager
memory.openDirFailed: Failed to open the memory folder: {error}
memory.soul.title: SOUL.md (essence)
memory.user.title: USER.md (about you)
memory.user.placeholder: Facts and preferences about you (the pet adds to this during chats)...
memory.memory.title: MEMORY.md (long-term memory)
memory.memory.placeholder: Insights and thoughts worth keeping (recorded during chats — only what's valuable, not a daily log)...
memory.heartbeat.title: HEARTBEAT.md (scheduled tasks)
memory.heartbeat.placeholder: The pet's scheduled-task list (read on each heartbeat to decide what to do; the pet maintains it too)...
tasks.title: Background Tasks
llm.empty: No LLM logs yet. Sending a chat message creates records.
settings.openConfigDirTitle: Open the config folder in the file manager
settings.openConfigDirFailed: Failed to open the config folder: {error}
settings.rawLoadFailed: Failed to load the config file: {error}
settings.agent.defaultNote: The desktop chat window is answered by this agent; switch any time from the chat page.
settings.agent.name: Name
settings.live2d.title: Live2D Model
settings.gallery.title: Gallery Slideshow
settings.gallery.enable: Enable gallery slideshow (main window shows images/videos instead of Live2D, switching every 10s)
settings.gallery.openDirTitle: Open this folder in the file manager
settings.gallery.intervalNote: Applies to images only; videos play through before switching.
settings.openGalleryDirFailed: Failed to open the gallery folder: {error}
settings.llm.title: LLM Settings
settings.llm.noModelsHint: No models available — check the URL / API Key
settings.llm.fillBaseFirst: Enter the API Base URL first
settings.llm.contextWindowNote: Denominator for the chat usage ring. Set it to your model's context length (e.g. 128000 for the gpt-4o family).
settings.search.title: Web Search
settings.search.apiKeyNote: Enables the web_search tool once a Tavily API key is set (get one free at tavily.com). Leave empty to keep the tool disabled.
settings.mcp.empty: No MCP servers yet — add one below
settings.mcp.headers: Custom headers (KEY: VALUE, one per line)
settings.hb.title: Scheduled Heartbeat
settings.hb.enable: Enable scheduled heartbeat (the pet wakes in the background on an interval to run tasks from HEARTBEAT.md)
settings.hb.note: Each heartbeat runs in the background; check results under the Tasks tab. The pet will message you with a system notification when needed. Edit the HEARTBEAT.md task list under this agent's Memory section.
settings.hb.contextTurns: Recent chat turns to carry (0 = none)
settings.hb.contextTurnsNote: The heartbeat forks the active chat's most recent turns so it knows what you've been talking about, not just HEARTBEAT.md. 0 carries no history. It never writes back to your chat — it only reaches you via a notification.
